title: Electric-field-tuned consecutive topological phase transitions between distinct correlated insulators in moire MoTe2/WSe2 heterobilayer
type1_summary: No clear figure-ready cleaned dataset files were identified.

classification_notes: The paper-analysis summary appears internally inconsistent with the paper title (it mentions twisted PbS moiré superlattices rather than MoTe2/WSe2), so the evidence should be treated cautiously. Only one PDF file was provided, and without content inspection it cannot be classified as dataset Type 1 or Type 2.

paper_analysis.summary: This paper reports the fabrication and characterization of twisted PbS moiré superlattices with strong interlayer chemical bonding, revealing twist-angle-dependent structural reconstruction and emergent flat-band electronic states.
